title: Payment Links
description: Create and share payment links with your customers

emptyState.title: No payment links yet
emptyState.description: Create your first payment link to start collecting online payments via WhatsApp, QR code, or direct link.
emptyState.noEcommerce: To use payment links, your venue needs an e-commerce affiliation with Blumon. Contact support to activate it.

requirements.createBlocked: You won't be able to create payment links until this setup is complete.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what the customer is paying for...
form.imageHint: Optional. Shown on the checkout page.
form.fixedHint: Customer pays the exact amount you set
form.reusableHint: Allow multiple payments with this link
form.singleUse: Single use — link deactivates after first payment
form.expirationHint: Optional. Link expires after this date.

preview.title: Preview
preview.defaultDescription: Please enter and pay the full balance outlined in your payment email.
preview.donationDefaultDescription: Support with a donation of any amount.

wizard.typeDescription: Choose the type of link that best fits your needs
wizard.paymentDescription: Charge a fixed amount or let the customer enter their own amount
wizard.itemDescription: Sell a product from your inventory directly with a link
wizard.eventDescription: Sell access to events, classes, or experiences
wizard.donationDescription: Receive donations of any amount with a personalized message

settings.title: General settings
settings.description: Configure settings and payment methods for your links
settings.creditCardHint: Visa, Mastercard, and Amex accepted through Blumon
settings.notificationsHint: Receive a notification by email after each transaction
settings.customerNotesHint: A text box will be shown for customers to leave an optional note when paying
settings.policiesHint: These policies are only shown on your payment link

branding.title: Branding
branding.description: Customize the appearance of your payment links
branding.logoHint: Show your logo at the top of the payment link

itemForm.articleHint: Details are saved in your item collection and shared across all points of sale
itemForm.selectProduct: Select or create a new item
itemForm.redirectAfterPayment: Redirect to a website after the payment process

itemPreview.redirectMessage: Your website will show after completing payment

confirm.archiveDescription: This link will no longer be accessible to customers. This action cannot be undone.
